nodes.name: 人类活动扰动
nodes.summary: 旅游、施工和高频活动影响繁殖或觅食。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: Buff-throated woodcreeper
nodes.summary: Buff-throated woodcreeper（Buff-throated woodcreeper，学名 Xiphorhynchus guttatus），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于塞阿拉州、常綠森林，主要威胁包括人类活动扰动。

nodes.name: 常綠森林
nodes.summary: 常綠森林是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联442种鸟类，包括紫冠雉、角冠雉、Razor-billed curassow等442种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 塞阿拉州
nodes.summary: 塞阿拉州是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联25种鸟类，包括Buff-browed chachalaca、Pygmy nightjar、阔尾隐蜂鸟等25种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: gracilirostris, Serra do Baturité in northeastern Brazil's Ceará state The buff-throated woodcreeper generally inhabits humid evergreen forest, but varies in details across its very large range

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: gracilirostris, Serra do Baturité in northeastern Brazil's Ceará state The buff-throated woodcreeper generally inhabits humid evergreen forest, but varies in details across its very large range

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: No immediate threats to either have been identified. The nominate subspecies is "largely restricted to scattered fragments of lowland Atlantic Forest, and likely to be moderately to highly sensitive to continued loss of forest." The other two subspecies of the "buff-throated" group are considered fairly common to common, and "probably only moderately sensitive to disturbance"
